name: Endless Decay
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>茫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>漠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you have 2000 LP or less, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: This card's ATK becomes half the opponent's LP.
mnst_eff: If you have 2000 LP or less, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: This card's ATK becomes half the opponent's LP.
eff: If you have 2000 LP or less, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: This card's ATK becomes half the opponent's LP.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
